channel.title: Something changes my video attributes
channel.description:
Hi,
I have a video in the hero of a page, in the background. I'm giving it the "playsInline" attribute, which is the right one for react. But something changes it to "playsinline", all lowercase. Does anyone know what might cause this change? It does it for the other attributes as well, and it also removed the "muted" attribute.
https://gist.github.com/kasperaamodt/9fdd979848e4a573ad0c8d4d7fae58b4#file-hero-js-L9
Hero video on this page: https://arctic-bioscience.com/

item.title: Something changes my video attributes
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
Hey @kasper.

I dont have an answer for you, however I will work on exactly that feature this week, so I will let you know how it goes for me.

Read full topic

item.title: Something changes my video attributes
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
Hi,

I have a video in the hero of a page, in the background. I’m giving it the “playsInline” attribute, which is the right one for react. But something changes it to “playsinline”, all lowercase. Does anyone know what might cause this change? It does it for the other attributes as well, and it also removed the “muted” attribute.

gist.github.com

https://gist.github.com/kasperaamodt/9fdd979848e4a573ad0c8d4d7fae58b4#file-hero-js-L9

hero.js
import React from "react";
import { connect, styled } from "frontity";
import Link from "@frontity/components/link";

const Hero = () => {
  return (
    <>
      <HeroContainer>
        <video playsInline autoPlay muted loop>
          <source src="https://backend.arctic-bioscience.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/hero.mp4" type="video/mp4" />
This file has been truncated. show original

Hero video on this page:

Arctic Bioscience

Home

Who we are We are a Norwegian biotechnology company focused on developing, manufacturing and marketing premium ingredients extracted from herring roe. Our

Est. reading time: 2 minutes

Read full topic
